notes: Solo entrepreneur Alana. Offers 20-60 min walks, drop-ins, boarding, pet sitting. Has pet care insurance and background check links on site.
Minimal web presence. Generic description says personalized care, no details on insurance or pack walks. Phone: 512-722-7367.
Founded 2021 by Peter. Service areas 78704, 78703, 78746. Licensed, insured, bonded. Fetch Find Training & Pet Aid certified. Site says 'FOLLOW US ON INSTAGRAM' but no handle displayed.
Daycare, boarding, grooming, training, event space. Group play with separate areas for large/small dogs. Phone: 512-518-5110.
Primarily a dog training company (private lessons, board & train, day training). Not a dog walking service. Owner Donovan Miller.
Founded 2010/2014 by Amy Fiala. Bonded, insured, first aid certified, NAPPS member. Has 'Find Us on Instagram' on site but handle not displayed.
Since 2010, run by Matt Myers. Insured & bonded. Pet first aid/CPR certified. Private walks only. GPS tracked walks.
6,000 sq ft boarding and daycare facility. Group play environment. Also has luxury boarding location. Phone: 512-524-2525.

businessName: JenniFurrr's Pet Sitting and Dog Walking
notes: Since 2008, woman-owned. Insured, bonded, trained in pet first aid. Accredited Pet Sitter through PSI. In-home pet sitting focus.
Run by Josh Perez. Certified in pet CPR, Pet Sitters International, pet nutrition certification. Individual structured walks with photos/video.
Minimal website with farm/pet care focus. Area code (203) suggests Connecticut. May not be actively operating in Austin.

businessName: Mary's Buddies Dog Walking & Pet Sitting
notes: Serves central, downtown, and south Austin. Focus on one-on-one walks. Also serves Dripping Springs. Phone: 512-296-6383.
Dog adventure and training service. Pack walks in nature are core to their day camp program. 3-phase: pack walk, training, supervised play. Phone: 737-205-9193.
Pet supply retail store, not a dog walking service. Sells food, treats, self-serve dog wash. 3 Austin locations.

businessName: Pet Friendly - Dog Walking & Pet Sitting
notes: Licensed, bonded, insured. Instagram active with recent posts (Mueller neighborhood walks). Free meet-and-greet. Phone: 512-745-6940.
Boarding, daycare, grooming. Group social play. Partners with Capital Veterinary Clinic. Phone: 512-416-7387.
Now primarily virtual coaching/training only. Formerly offered pack hikes in Austin but no longer provides in-person services in Austin.
Since 2009. Full service: walking, grooming, boarding, training, pet taxi. 'Catch the Cuteness on Insta' on site. 50+ employees, bonded, insured.
Basic website with limited info. Provides dog walking services. No social media or insurance details found.
Premium downtown pet care. Certified in Pet CPR and First Aid. Offers daycare, dog walks, boarding, grooming, training, pet transportation. Phone: 512-714-9663.
Dog daycare + coworking space. 17,000 sq ft kennel-free facility. Staff CPR and First Aid trained. Indoor play park concept retired Jan 2026.

businessName: Leaf It To Me Pet & Plant Care
notes: Run by Chelsea Zunker. In-home pet sitting + plant care combo. Fear Free certified. All-inclusive pricing. Phone: 512-703-0207.
